tasks.label: My share of the group project
Teammate's share (just dumped on me)

memory.summary: Teammate_A asked me to take over their part of the project this afternoon, which conflicts with my plan to finish only my share.
I've made good progress on my share, but teammate_A is still asking me to take over their work.
Teammate_A is willing to split or defer their work if I set boundaries, and my previous message has not damaged our trust.
I've made solid progress on my assigned portion, increasing completion from 0.48 to 0.62 in two hours.
I have made progress on my share, but the project is due in under an hour and remains unfinished.
Both my share and the teammate's dumped work missed their 19:00 deadline, leaving the project at 72% completion with no time to finish.
I absorbed my teammate's abandoned work, increasing my load despite already being stressed and sleep-deprived with the deadline passed.
I worked two more hours to raise progress from 0.72 to 0.78, but with my energy critically low and stress high, the project remains unfinished.
Despite working an hour, my progress only rose slightly to 0.81, and with zero energy and high stress, the remaining work feels overwhelming.
After working another hour, my progress barely increased to 0.84 while my energy remains at zero and stress is critically high.
My energy is depleted and stress remains critical, yet my progress has stalled at 0.84 despite hours of work.
After two hours of work, my progress finally rose to 0.90, yet I remain completely drained with critical stress levels.
